# ZEP Guidebook (EN)

## ZEP Guidebook (EN)

- [Hello ZEP Script](https://docs.zep.us/hello-zep-script.md)
- [ZEP Script Guide](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide.md)
- [ZEP Script Development Guide](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/zep-script-development-guide.md): Updated 2022.08.01
- [JavaScript Development Tips](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/zep-script-development-guide/javascript-development-tips.md)
- [ZEP Script Deployment Guide](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/zep-script-development-guide/zep-script-deployment-guide.md): This document explains how to deploy an app created with ZEP Script.
- [TypeScript Development Tips](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/zep-script-development-guide/typescript-development-tips.md)
- [Explore ZEP Script](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script.md)
- [Tutorials](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/tutorials.md)
- [Displaying a Message](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/tutorials/displaying-a-message.md): Displaying a Message - Hello world
- [Changing Avatar Image](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/tutorials/changing-avatar-image.md)
- [Using HTML](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/tutorials/using-html.md)
- [Communicating with an External API](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/tutorials/communicating-with-an-external-api.md)
- [Creating a 2-Second Stun Effect](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/tutorials/creating-a-2-second-stun-effect.md)
- [ZEP Script Example Code](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code.md)
- [Timer](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/timer.md)
- [Zombie Game](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/zombie-game.md)
- [Paintman Game](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/paintman-game.md)
- [Hangul Quiz Game](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/hangul-quiz-game.md)
- [Avoid Poop Game](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/avoid-poop-game.md)
- [Boxing Game](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/boxing-game.md)
- [Sidebar App](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/sidebar-app.md)
- [Race](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/explore-zep-script/zep-script-example-code/race.md)
- [ZEP Script FAQ](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/zep-script-faq.md)
- [Appendix](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix.md)
- [ZEP Script Use Cases](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/zep-script-use-cases.md)
- [Understanding Spaces and Maps](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/understanding-spaces-and-maps.md)
- [JavaScript Keycode List](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/javascript-keycode-list.md)
- [Understanding Sprite Sheets](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/understanding-sprite-sheets.md)
- [TileEffectType Detailed Explanation](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/tileeffecttype-detailed-explanation.md)
- [What are Reference Coordinates?](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/what-are-reference-coordinates.md)
- [Communicating with an External API](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/communicating-with-an-external-api.md)
- [How to Use URL Query Strings](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/how-to-use-url-query-strings.md)
- [How to Change the Mobile Interaction Button](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/how-to-change-the-mobile-interaction-button.md)
- [Grammar Available for Widgets](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/grammar-available-for-widgets.md)
- [Object Interaction with ZEP Script](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/object-interaction-with-zep-script.md)
- [Object npcProperty](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-guide/appendix/object-npcproperty.md)
- [ZEP Script API](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api.md): This document provides guidance on the four classes that make up ZEP Script.
- [API Summary](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/api-summary.md)
- [ScriptApp](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp.md)
- [Lifecycle](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp/lifecycle.md)
- [Field](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp/field.md)
- [Storage](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp/storage.md): App storage is where you keep the app data inside Spaces.
- [Event Listeners](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp/event-listeners.md)
- [Callbacks](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp/callbacks.md)
- [Methods](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptapp/methods.md)
- [ScriptMap](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptmap.md)
- [Field](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptmap/field.md)
- [Methods](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptmap/methods.md)
- [ScriptPlayer](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptplayer.md)
- [Field](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptplayer/field.md)
- [Methods](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptplayer/methods.md)
- [ScriptWidget](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptwidget.md)
- [Field](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptwidget/field.md)
- [Event Listeners](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptwidget/event-listeners.md)
- [Methods](https://docs.zep.us/zep-script/zep-script-api/scriptwidget/methods.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.zep.us/hello-zep-script.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
